nav.leaderboardHint: See who learned the most this week

landing.heroDescription: Learn through animated visual explanations. Play with free calculators. Master concepts with gamified quizzes. No signup needed to explore.
landing.trustLine: Free • No card required • Works in your language
landing.howStep1Description: Play with our visual calculators. See math come alive through animation. No account needed.
landing.howStep2Description: Take quizzes that adapt to your level. Earn XP for every correct answer.
landing.howStep3Description: Maintain streaks, unlock badges, and climb the weekly leaderboard.
landing.proofSubtitle: Join thousands of students mastering math visually
landing.languageBannerSubtitle: AiMath is built for Kyrgyzstan and the CIS region. Choose your language:
landing.finalCtaDescription: Jump into the free visual calculators, or create an account to track your progress.
landing.footerTagline: Math education for the CIS region.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to save your XP, streaks, and badges.
auth.registerSubtitle: Takes less than a minute. No payment required.

dashboard.title: My progress
dashboard.subtitle: Track your learning journey
dashboard.noBadgesYet: No badges earned yet — complete a quiz to start!

leaderboard.title: Weekly leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Top learners by XP earned this week — updated regularly
leaderboard.empty: No scores yet this week — be the first!

quiz.pageSubtitle: Choose a topic and difficulty. Answer questions to earn XP.
quiz.comingSoon: Full quiz flow is coming soon — you can practice in calculators today.
quiz.question: Question {current} of {total}
quiz.guestPrompt: Create an account to save your score and track progress

fractions.enterValues: Enter two fractions and choose an operation
fractions.visual: Each circle shows shaded parts — the denominator is how many equal parts, the numerator is how many are shaded

fractions.label: Fractions
fractions.shortHint: Add and subtract step by step
fractions.description: Add and subtract fractions with a clear circle model — same-sized parts, then combine
fractions.step1: The parts are different sizes (denominators {b} and {d}). We need equal parts to add or subtract.
fractions.step2: Both circles are now divided into {lcd} equal parts.
fractions.step3: Same-sized parts — now we can combine the shaded areas.

negative.label: Number Line
negative.shortHint: Jump left and right on a line
negative.description: Learn positive and negative jumps on a number line
negative.step0: Starting at {a} on the number line

multiplication.label: Area Grid
multiplication.description: See multiplication as filling a rectangular area
multiplication.step1: Filling row by row — {filled} of {total} squares

division.label: Fair Share
division.shortHint: Share items equally step by step
division.description: Split a group of items equally into boxes
division.step0: We have {total} items to share between {groups} groups
